ValidationRule.description: Unit Testing must be completed before story can move to Dev Completed status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Dev Completed"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Unit_Testing_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unit Testing must be completed before moving to "Dev Completed". Please complete unit testing and check the "Unit Testing Complete" checkbox first.
